message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 14:15 and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from norwich and should leave on friday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 2 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve indian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 19:15 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
